title: Elytra Slot
description: Add a back slot to the player's inventory, allowing players to place elytra in this slot. This lets players use elytra without occupying the chestplate slot.
body:
在玩家的物品栏中添加背部槽位，允许玩家将鞘翅放在该槽位中。可以在不牺牲胸甲槽位的情况下使用鞘翅。
Add a back slot to the player's inventory, allowing players to place elytra in this slot. This lets players use elytra without occupying the chestplate slot.![展示](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7a19129da5e322c481e63340490a10b701d4b13.png)
